Cheemspad - The token sale launchpad for everyone!

Cheemspad is the home of safe token launches brought to you by Meme.tech and the Cheems Inu team!

Launch your project!Earn by staking CINU

Cheemspad is a multi-chain launchpad. No matter whether you plan utilizing Ethereums vast ecosystem, prefer Binance Smart Chains economic gas price model and large audience or would like to launch your project on an innovative, scalable blockchain like the Avalanche C-Chain: we got you covered!

We currently support these chains:

Ethereum
Bridge
Binance smart chain
Presale
Avalanche C-Chain
Claim CINU
